trigger: User sent the VCPChat /codex-router command and the UI reported codex_router_policy_config_entry_missing:A:\VCP\codex-router\dist\packages\policy-config\src\index.js.
rootCause: The live VCPChat IPC path called loadVcpChatCodexRouterPolicy() without an explicit routerRoot, so codexRouterHost.js used DEFAULT_CODEX_ROUTER_ROOT under A:/VCP/codex-router. The actual router workspace is A:/codex-router.
implementedBehavior: When no explicit routerRoot or VCP_CODEX_ROUTER_ROOT is provided, codexRouterHost.js now checks the original A:/VCP/codex-router default and the drive-root A:/codex-router candidate, choosing the first candidate that contains dist/packages/policy-config/src/index.js.
notValidated: User has not yet resent the /codex-router UI command after this root-discovery fix.
DesktopRemote HTTP command path still rejects CodexRouterHost at the DesktopRemote normalizer layer with HTTP 400; this is separate from the UI IPC path.
nextGate: Ask the user to resend /codex-router inspect current router status in the restarted VCPChat window and verify the policy_config_entry_missing error is gone.
